title: tanacetum lineare
intro: Tanacetum lineare, also known as linear tansy or narrow-leaved tansy, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family, known for its fern-like foliage and small, yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tanacetum lineare include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to act as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum lineare can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
